Home · Interior

Where Craft Meets Surface.

Three families of premium peel-and-stick finishes — mirror panels, mosaic sheets, designer wallpapers. Curated by RKN. Installed across India.

Explore the Collection
The Interior Division

Twenty Years of Craft. A New Chapter for Your Walls.

RKN Interior is the surface arm of RKN Associates — the same eye for material, finish, and longevity, applied to a curated catalog of imported peel-and-stick wall coverings. Mirror panels, mosaic sheets, and designer wallpapers, sourced for clients who want their walls to do as much work as their steelwork. Supply across India. Installation support for selected projects.

Chapter 01
Mirror Wall Panels

Statement Walls, One Tile at a Time.

Mirrored 12-inch panels with sculpted diamond patterns, hand-laid across full walls or installed as accent strips. Two pattern families. Three shades. Same self-adhesive, no-grout, no-mess install.

Shade
Size
1 ft × 1 ft
Material
Premium Mirror
Install
Peel & Stick
Per Box
22 Pieces

Silver FiligreeRestaurant · Banquet
Gold FiligreeCafé · Hospitality

Chapter 02
Mosaic Wall Tiles

Texture, in Miniature.

One-inch mirror mosaics laid in pre-glued sheets. Two sheet sizes. Three colorways. Suited to indoor accent walls — and one finish purpose-built for outdoor garden walls.

Bronze Copper

Warm copper and bronze flakes set in mirrored 1-inch squares. The softest of the three — best in libraries, lounges, and bedroom feature walls.

Tile1" × 1"
Sheet8" × 10"
Per Box33 Sheets · 17.77 sq.ft
Charcoal Silver

Smoky greys and brushed silver in alternating texture. Larger sheet size for fast coverage on tall feature walls.

Tile1" × 1"
Sheet12" × 12"
Per Box33 Sheets · 33 sq.ft
Gold & Silver Checker

Alternating gold and silver squares in a tight check. Sealed for outdoor use — built for garden walls, balcony features, and covered porches.

Tile1" × 1"
Sheet8" × 10"
Per Box33 Sheets · 17.77 sq.ft
Indoor + Outdoor
Enquire about Mosaic Tiles
Chapter 03
Designer Wallpapers

A Library of Surfaces.

Twenty-six designs in five families. Glossy laminated PVC, self-adhesive, water-resistant, made to be lived with. Each design has a code — quote it on WhatsApp or in the form below.

Featured 01 of 05
CLS · 157

Gold Vein
Marble.

Heavy gold veining drawn through a quiet white field. A traditional palette read through a contemporary hand — calm, grounded, unmistakably premium. Recommended for living rooms, master bedrooms, and double-height entrances.

Enquire about this Design
Featured 02 of 05
RKN · MB · 05

Deep
Tide.

Mountain-wave marble in navy and ice — gold ridgelines drawn across every break. The most cinematic surface in the collection. Best behind a low sofa, low bed, or in any room you want to make smaller, deeper, more intimate.

Enquire about this Design
Featured 03 of 05
RKN · BT · 01

Emerald
Foliage.

Gold-veined leaves layered across a deep emerald ground. A dark-room wallpaper, best with lamplight or a single overhead pendant — most luxurious in dining rooms, libraries, and the wall behind a four-poster bed.

Enquire about this Design
Featured 04 of 05
RKN · MB · 03

Teal
Geode.

Diagonal currents of teal split by gold seams. A geode opened and printed flat — luminous, alive. A statement wall for a single defining room, not a quiet supporting role.

Enquire about this Design
Featured 05 of 05
AD · 007

Steel Cloud
Marble.

Storm-blue clouds suspended in white stone, threaded with gold. Drama held in restraint — best behind low furniture so the pattern reads as sky, not stone.

Enquire about this Design
